violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/19/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026
ROP fish was observed thawing with packaging still intact. Packages were cut into during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026
The plumbing to the 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Inspector observed pipe detached beneath middle bay and faucet head leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
The floor in the kettle area is in poor repair. Tiles observed missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Dumpster was covered at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The refuse area was observed with an accumulation of debris. Refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The dumpster outside is located on rocks/dirt. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Establishment must move dumpster on to approved material. Dumpster company was called at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
Handwashing sinks are lacking signage. A sign or poster musted be posted to notify food employees to wash their hands. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
ROP salmon was observed thawing with packaging still intact. PIC informed and and cut opening in package. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quaternary and chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (dishwasher and 3 bay sink ). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves) have an accumulation of soil residue and rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
Handwashing sinks are lacking signage. A sign or poster must be posted notifying food employees of handwashing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service and ice disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

Gravy, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

Various food product was observed held at (47-59) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC), (gravy) was placed hot in the refrigerator in a container greater than four inches deep. PIC informed of proper cooling methods. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
Observed ROP salmon in walk in cooler with packaging still intact. PIC informed and made a cut into packages. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
Inspector observed food product being stored in commercial grade buckets. PIC placed foods in food grade buckets during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

Prep unit located in the (kitchen) area was not in good repair. Ambient temperatures observed at 45DF.Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food products in unit until replaced and/or repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (quaternary and chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (dishwasher and 3 bay sink). New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves in the kitchen area) have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024
